data.title: Elon Musk Mocks Tesla Shorts After Stock Hits $400 In Overnight Trading On Robinhood
data.description: Tesla CEO Elon Musk mocked short sellers of the company on Sunday after the stock breached $400 on Robinhood's overnight trading service.

data.title: Toll Brothers, Oracle And 3 Stocks To Watch Heading Into Monday
S&P 500, Nasdaq Hit Record Close As November Jobs Data Beats Expectations: Fear & Greed Index In 'Neutral' Zone
Stocks And Crypto Ride Optimism, But November CPI Could Be The Ultimate Market Test, Investors Warn
data.description: In anticipation of the year-end, investors are eyeing a potential rally in stocks and cryptocurrencies, driven by lower interest rates, decreasing inflation, and rising corporate profits.

data.title: Trump's Deregulation Efforts To Benefit Energy, Oil And Gas Sectors, While AI Frenzy Will Boost FAANG Stocks And Nvidia, Says Fintech Insider
data.description: President-elect Donald Trump's victory has fueled a rally in equities. This is likely to sustain as the administration plans on "tax cuts and deregulation will lead to higher corporate earnings," said Yogesh Kansal.
